title: Paradise blocks
description: This mod adds one block (so far) that looks like smooth stone but without corners!
body:
Features:



Whitestone:



Recipe:

Smelt smooth stone.



Trade: 

Mason, journeyman



Generation:

Y:63 - Y:-64, can replace: stone, diorite



Note: has a slab and a stair variant, that can be crafted with a stone cutter or a crafting table
